name: Write all bit TRUE
func:
msg.payload = [0xFFFF, 0xFFFF, 0xFFFF];
return msg;

name: write all bit FALSE
func:
msg.payload = [0x0000, 0x0000, 0x0000];
return msg;

info:
• Use the Modbus FC3 function to communicate
  • If you're communicating with the WagoAppPlcModbus library, an offset of 20 must be used for the inputs
  • If you're communicating with the plc-modbus-server Docker container, the offset is 0
